content:
# Thermal Tolerance

**Summary**: The ability of an organism to survive and function within a specific range of temperatures.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] evaluated the high thermal tolerance of intertidal biocalcifiers in the western Arabian Gulf.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] Relevant for understanding survival in the extreme environments of the Arabian Gulf.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] Experimental observation of specimen viability at increasing temperatures.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Experimental specimens could sustain temperatures above 40°C, even up to 50°C before dying. ([[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023, p. 77]])

## Contrasting Values and Interpretations

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] Survival above 40°C, up to 50°C.

## Open Questions and Research Gaps
